cover:
A high-quality architectural system block diagram illustrating the "CLAUDE API + SALESFORCE AGENT".
Overall Theme: Technical architecture map, clean flow chart, analytical, educational, modern and well-structured layout.
Background: A very clean, subtle light gray background with faint grid lines.

Header:
- At the top-center, a massive dark bold rounded header block displaying "CLAUDE API + SALESFORCE AGENT".
- Below the title, a small subtitle: "End-to-End Architecture for a Production AI Agent on Salesforce".
- In the top-right corner, a small circular profile icon labeled "Bennie Joseph | Architect".

Architecture Layers (Arranged hierarchically with clear connections):
- A "Salesforce Context Layer" container (colored in neon blue) containing modules: "Case Record", "Account + Entitlement", "Knowledge Articles", "Open Cases".
- A "Claude Agent Loop (claude-sonnet-4-7)" container (colored in neon green) containing modules: "Tool Registry", "tool_use Execution", "Structured JSON Output", "200K Context".
- A "Action + Audit Layer" container (colored in grey) containing modules: "Apex Invocable Action", "Confidence Validator", "Audit Logger", "Human Escalation".
- A central block at the heart of the system labeled "runAgent() Loop" with a rotating arrow icon. This central node has multiple dotted directional connector lines feeding into and out of all surrounding layers.
- An "INTEGRATION LAYER" box on the upper right with modules "Anthropic API anthropic-version: 2026-01-01" and "Salesforce REST API v64.0".
- A bottom panel labeled "PRODUCTION GUARDRAILS" with sub-modules "Max Turns = 10", "Confidence Gate >= 0.85", "Idempotency Key", "Kill Switch".

Style Details: Technical blueprint style, clean rounded rectangle containers, precise dotted lines with arrowheads showing control and data flow, soft pastel color scheme (pale yellows, soft blues, light greens, and dark blues), micro vector icons inside each block, neat modern sans-serif fonts, absolutely crisp rendering, no blurred elements, zero spelling mistakes, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images:
A highly detailed, technical blueprint-style developer infographic poster on the theme of "CLAUDE-SONNET-4-7 FOR SALESFORCE".
Overall Theme: High-tech dark mode developer dashboard, cybersecurity blueprint, with sharp glowing lines and neat borders.
Colors: Deep dark navy background with glowing neon blue, electric cyan, warning red, and success green highlights.

Header:
- A prominent top-center glowing blue header: "CLAUDE-SONNET-4-7 FOR SALESFORCE".
- Below it, a clean subtitle: "Why This Model Wins for Case Triage, Policy Checks, and Email Drafts" with a small Salesforce logo on the top-left and an "APEX BEST PRACTICES" badge on the top-right.

Section 1: "WHY IT MATTERS" (Top Row, 3 Horizontal Cards)
- "200K Context" with a layers icon, "Precise tool_use" with a target icon, "Low Hallucination" with a shield icon

Section 2: "THE COST" (Middle Row, Side-by-Side Comparison)
- Left Box (Red Theme): "WRONG MODEL CHOICE — Generic Completion". Shows a red status pill "DANGER — ANTI-PATTERN".
- Right Box (Green Theme): "RIGHT: claude-sonnet-4-7 for Salesforce Context". Shows a green status pill "SUCCESS — BEST PRACTICE".

Section 3: "CODE PATTERNS" (Main Center)
- Left Column (Bad Code in Red Border):
  - Heading: "// BAD"
  - Code block:
    // Wrong: treating Salesforce agent like a chatbot
const res = await openai.chat.completions.create({
  model: 'gpt-5.5',
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: caseText }]
})
// No system role. No tools. No confidence.
// Returns prose. Cannot drive Apex.
- Right Column (Good Code in Green Border):
  - Heading: "// GOOD"
  - Code block:
    const res = await anthropic.messages.create({
  model: 'claude-sonnet-4-7',
  system: systemPrompt,   // role + rules + schema
  messages: context,      // case + entitlement + KB
  tools: sfTools,         // classifyCase, checkEntitlement
  max_tokens: 1024,
})
// Returns tool_use block → safe Apex commit

Section 4: "DEVELOPER PROFILE & CHECKLIST" (Bottom Row)
- Left Side: A 3D Pixar-style cartoon avatar portrait of a dark-skinned South Asian male with a full thick black beard, shoulder-length wavy dark hair pulled up into a messy top bun, warm friendly smile showing teeth, wearing a grey crew-neck sweatshirt with the word "MAGNETIC" on it, set against a warm orange bokeh background. The avatar is labeled "Bennie Joseph | Salesforce Architect". Next to it is a quote bubble: "Architecting intuitive systems, engineering scalable solutions."
- Right Side: A checklist with points: "Use anthropic-version: 2026-01-01 header always", "Inject case + entitlement + KB articles in system prompt", "Define tools with strict JSON Schema — no freeform output", "Set confidence threshold in tool response contract", "Test with 50 real cases before deploying to Agentforce".
- Footer: A thin bar with icons for "claude-sonnet-4-7", "tool_use", "Salesforce v64.0", "Agentforce 2.0" and the text "CODE SMART. AUTOMATE FASTER. DELIVER EXCELLENCE."

Style Details: Super high resolution, technical drawing grid, razor-sharp white and neon text, crisp layout, developer IDE aesthetic, flat vector graphics with subtle glow, highly legible monospace font for code blocks, professional presentation.

A highly detailed, technical blueprint-style developer infographic poster on the theme of "PRODUCTION AGENT CHECKLIST".
Overall Theme: High-tech dark mode developer dashboard, cybersecurity blueprint, with sharp glowing lines and neat borders.
Colors: Deep dark navy background with glowing neon blue, electric cyan, warning red, and success green highlights.

Header:
- A prominent top-center glowing blue header: "PRODUCTION AGENT CHECKLIST".
- Below it, a clean subtitle: "What Separates a Working Demo from a Trusted Enterprise Agent" with a small Salesforce logo on the top-left and an "APEX BEST PRACTICES" badge on the top-right.

Section 1: "WHY IT MATTERS" (Top Row, 3 Horizontal Cards)
- "Bounded Execution" with a clock icon, "Confidence Gates" with a filter icon, "Idempotent Writes" with a key icon

Section 2: "THE COST" (Middle Row, Side-by-Side Comparison)
- Left Box (Red Theme): "DEMO AGENT — Trust Issues in Production". Shows a red status pill "DANGER — ANTI-PATTERN".
- Right Box (Green Theme): "PRODUCTION AGENT — Enterprise Guardrails Active". Shows a green status pill "SUCCESS — BEST PRACTICE".

Section 3: "CODE PATTERNS" (Main Center)
- Left Column (Bad Code in Red Border):
  - Heading: "// BAD"
  - Code block:
    // No timeout, no confidence gate, no idempotency
const agent = new ClaudeAgent()
while (!agent.done) {
  await agent.step()       // loops forever?
}
agent.updateSalesforce()   // no duplicate check
- Right Column (Good Code in Green Border):
  - Heading: "// GOOD"
  - Code block:
    const result = await runWithGuards({
  agent: claudeSonnet47Agent,
  maxTurns: 10,
  timeoutMs: 15000,
  confidenceGate: 0.85,
  onLowConfidence: routeToHumanQueue,
  onCommit: apexIdempotentWriter,
})

Section 4: "DEVELOPER PROFILE & CHECKLIST" (Bottom Row)
- Left Side: A 3D Pixar-style cartoon avatar portrait of a dark-skinned South Asian male with a full thick black beard, shoulder-length wavy dark hair pulled up into a messy top bun, warm friendly smile showing teeth, wearing a grey crew-neck sweatshirt with the word "MAGNETIC" on it, set against a warm orange bokeh background. The avatar is labeled "Bennie Joseph | Salesforce Architect". Next to it is a quote bubble: "Architecting intuitive systems, engineering scalable solutions."
- Right Side: A checklist with points: "MAX_TURNS enforced — agent cannot loop indefinitely", "Timeout per step and per full transaction", "Confidence < 0.85 → route to human review queue", "All Salesforce writes go through Apex idempotency layer", "Full audit log: inputs, tool calls, outputs, approvals".
- Footer: A thin bar with icons for "claude-sonnet-4-7", "Agentforce 2.0", "Apex v64.0", "Audit Trail" and the text "CODE SMART. AUTOMATE FASTER. DELIVER EXCELLENCE."

Style Details: Super high resolution, technical drawing grid, razor-sharp white and neon text, crisp layout, developer IDE aesthetic, flat vector graphics with subtle glow, highly legible monospace font for code blocks, professional presentation.
